Why We Exist
The Mission

Too many young people in New York City are navigating life without guidance, without vision, and without someone in their corner who truly believes in them. That's the gap Moye Speaks was built to close.

Through discipleship, one-on-one mentorship, and community programming, we walk alongside youth and young adults at the most pivotal stage of their lives — helping them discover who they are, what they're capable of, and where they're going.

This work is funded by people who believe the next generation is worth investing in. Every dollar given goes directly toward programming, resources, and reaching more young people across the city.

"I want to thank you so much for presenting us that life-changing conversation. I felt an immediate difference in my life after hearing you speak."
Skyler Adelson, Age 16
Support the Mission
Give Monthly

This work doesn't happen without people who believe in it. A monthly gift — any amount — keeps the mission moving and puts more young people in rooms where their lives can change.

$10
/ month

Helps cover session materials and resources for one youth per month.

/ month — Most Common

Supports a full week of programming and community outreach across NYC.

/ month

Sponsors a youth through an entire 8-week Life On Purpose cycle.

/ month

Sustains an ongoing one-on-one mentorship relationship from start to finish.
